{{Infobox group
| name = Avernus
| introduced = tg-01-house-of-blades
}}

''See also: [[Avernus Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Avernus is a [[Territory]] characterized by its unpredictable nature, particularly regarding the flow of time. Time within this realm fluctuates in irregular patterns and is notoriously difficult to forecast, meaning that the duration experienced inside can differ significantly from the time passed outside. Because of these temporal inconsistencies, traveling through Avernus with precision is a difficult and time-consuming endeavor. The region is also known as a home to ten thousand different bird species. Avernus is associated with several distinct figures. There is an individual known as [[Grandmaster Avernus]], who leads scouts and possesses the authority of her rank. Additionally, there is an entity referred to as the [[Incarnation]] of Avernus, a being with four unique wings and bronze feathers instead of hair. There are also [[Travelers]] belonging to Avernus, who can be identified by specific markings and are known to utilize large white eagles for flight.}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Grandmaster Avernus]] sent out fliers to scout the wilderness between [[Bel Calem]] and [[Enosh]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c23">''House of Blades'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Avernus is a territory of birds characterized by the presence of diving white eagles. This difficult terrain was entered by [[Alin]], where travelers are known to wear feathered head-wraps. Within this land, the culture places a high value on loyalty.}}

{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Avernus Travelers]] wear feathered head-wraps.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c12">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Avernus]] is a [[Territory]] that highly values loyalty.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c13">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Avernus]] is a [[Territory]] that can be traveled through with difficulty.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c16">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Alin]] walked into [[Avernus]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Avernus]] is a [[Territory]] of birds.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c18">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Avernus]] is a place with diving white eagles.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c20">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Avernus is one of the nine [[Territories]], a realm where time flows more slowly than in the outside world. This entity is characterized as a woman possessing two sets of wings and is associated with psychic attacks and traditional wooden armor. While [[Simon]] suspected that [[Feiora Torannus]] was an Avernus performing a mental assault, the entity itself is powerful enough to be compared to [[Lirial]]. Although a Gate can be opened to reach this [[Territory]], Avernus has since been sealed back within her domain. It is also believed that she was likely involved in the prophecy.}}

{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Avernus]] is a [[Territory]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c4">''City of Light'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]] suspects Feiora's command is a mental attack from [[Avernus]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c11">''City of Light'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Feiora Torannus]] is an [[Avernus]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Avernus]] has guards on the other side.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c12">''City of Light'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Avernus]] is a group or entity associated with traditional wooden armor and psychic attacks.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Avernus]] can launch psychic attacks.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Avernus]] is a place [[Lycus]] needs to get out of.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c14">''City of Light'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|A Gate can be opened to [[Avernus]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c15">''City of Light'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Lirial]] is compared to [[Avernus]] in terms of power.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c17">''City of Light'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Avernus]] is a [[Territory]] where time moves more slowly than in the outside world.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c18">''City of Light'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Avernus]] is a woman with two sets of wings.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Avernus]] is one of the nine [[Territories]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c19">''City of Light'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Avernus]] has been sealed back into her [[Territory]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Avernus]] was likely involved in the prophecy.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c27">''City of Light'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|“The Avernus, Feiora Torannus,” she said.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c11" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate groups]]
